get.summary:
ListSpaceApiKeys returns all API keys for a space
Required Permissions:
- read:serverless_api_keys

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
Space the API keys belong to (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

delete.summary:
DeleteSpaceApiKey removes an API key from a space
Required Permissions:
- delete:serverless_api_keys

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
Space the key belongs to (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceApiKeyId
parameters.description:
ID of the key to delete (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

post.summary:
CreateSpaceApiKey creates a new API key for a space
Required Permissions:
- write:serverless_api_keys

parameters.name: spaceApiKey.accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceApiKey.spaceId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the space api key (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space api key is created.

createdAt.description:
Timestamp when the space api key was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space api key is created.

name.description:
Name of the space api key.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, underscores and dashes.

expiresAt.description:
The expiration time of the space api key. The key will be invalid after this time.
This field is optional, and if not provided, the key does not expire.

accessRules.description:
A list of rules to grant access to the Qdrant serverless space or to specific
collections in that space. If no access rules are provided, global access to the space
with manage permissions is assumed. The list can contain a maximum of 20
access rules.

createdBy.description:
The caller who created the space api key.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space api key is created.

deletedBy.description:
The caller who deleted the space api key.
This is a read-only field and will be available after deletion starts.

deletedAt.description:
Timestamp when the space api key was deleted (or is started to be deleting).
This is a read-only field and will be set after DeleteSpaceApiKey is called.

postfix.description:
Postfix for the space api key, this represents the last bytes of the key.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space api key is created.

key.description:
The key for the space api key.
This is a read-only field and will be available only once in the response of CreateSpaceApiKey.
You should securely store this key and it should be handled as a secret.

state.description:
Status of the space api key.
All fields inside `state` are read-only.

revokedAt.description:
Timestamp when the space api key was revoked.
This is a read-only field and will be set after the space api key is revoked.

revokedBy.description:
The caller who revoked the space api key.
This is a read-only field and will be available after the key is revoked.

spaceApiKey.description:
The API key to create.
This is a required field.

SpaceApiKeyServiceCreateSpaceApiKeyBody.title: CreateSpaceApiKeyRequest defines parameters for creating a new space API key

globalAccess.description: A rule granting global access to the entire space.

collectionAccess.description: A rule granting access to a specific collection in the space.

v1AccessRule.description:
Represents an access rule. An access rule can either define global access to
the space or access to a specific collection.

v1ActorType.description:
ActorType specifies the type of actor that can call a method.

 - ACTOR_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default, unspecified actor type. Should generally not be used explicitly in options
unless to signify an error or uninitialized state.
 - ACTOR_TYPE_USER: Represents a human user, typically authenticated via an identity provider (Auth0).
 - ACTOR_TYPE_MANAGEMENT_KEY: Represents a programmatic access key, also called management key,
that is not be tied to a specific user or service account identity, but rather an account.
 - ACTOR_TYPE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT: Represents a service account or machine user, often used for M2M communication.
This is for internal platform use only.

actorId.description: Unique identifier of the actor (user UUID, management-key id, service-account id, …).

userAgent.description:
HTTP User-Agent of the client that initiated the request, when available.
Omitted for internal/service-initiated actions without a client User-Agent.

v1Caller.description: Caller identifies the authenticated actor that performed an action on a resource.

collectionName.description:
The name of the collection.
This is a required field.

accessType.description:
The type of access granted for the collection.
This is a required field.

v1CollectionAccessRule.description: Represents an access rule for a specific collection in the space.

v1CollectionAccessRuleAccessType.description:
- COLLECTION_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified access type.
 - COLLECTION_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_READ_ONLY: Grants access to perform collection-related actions that only read data (like `get collection info`).
 - COLLECTION_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_READ_WRITE: Grants access to perform collection-related actions that read or write data (like `upsert points`).
v1CollectionAccessRuleAccessType.title:
CollectionAccessRuleAccessType defines the types of access allowed on a specific collection.
For a detailed list of actions allowed for each access type, see:
https://qdrant.tech/documentation/guides/security/#table-of-access

spaceApiKey.title: The newly created API key value

v1CreateSpaceApiKeyResponse.title: CreateSpaceApiKeyResponse provides the API key after creation

v1DeleteSpaceApiKeyResponse.title: DeleteSpaceApiKeyResponse is an empty response for deletion confirmation

accessType.description:
The type of access granted at the global level.
This is a required field.

v1GlobalAccessRule.description: Represents a global access rule that grants access to the entire space.

v1GlobalAccessRuleAccessType.description:
- GLOBAL_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified access type.
 - GLOBAL_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_METRICS_READ_ONLY: Grants access to perform to read the metrics (it cannot access any data, only metadata)
 - GLOBAL_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_READ_ONLY: Grants access to perform actions that only read data (e.g., list collections, including metrics).
 - GLOBAL_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_MANAGE: Grants access to perform all actions available in the space (e.g., update aliases).
v1GlobalAccessRuleAccessType.title:
GlobalAccessRuleAccessType defines the possible access levels for global access rules.
For a detailed list of actions allowed for each access type, see:
TODO: serverless list like https://qdrant.tech/documentation/guides/security/#table-of-access

items.title: List of API keys for the space

v1ListSpaceApiKeysResponse.title: Response containing all API keys associated with a space

id.description:
Unique identifier for the space api key (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space api key is created.

accountId.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

createdAt.description:
Timestamp when the space api key was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space api key is created.

spaceId.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

name.description:
Name of the space api key.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, underscores and dashes.

expiresAt.description:
The expiration time of the space api key. The key will be invalid after this time.
This field is optional, and if not provided, the key does not expire.

accessRules.description:
A list of rules to grant access to the Qdrant serverless space or to specific
collections in that space. If no access rules are provided, global access to the space
with manage permissions is assumed. The list can contain a maximum of 20
access rules.

This is a read-only field and will be available after a space api key is created.

This is a read-only field and will be available after deletion starts.

v1SpaceApiKey.description:
A SpaceApiKey represents one space api key of a Qdrant cloud account.
This space key can grant access to a Qdrant cloud serverless space.

phase.description: The current operational status of the space api key.

reason.description:
Descriptive message explaining any errors or issues with the space api key.
Empty when the API key is operating normally.

v1SpaceApiKeyState.description:
SpaceApiKeyState represents the operational state of a space API key in the
Qdrant serverless environment. It provides status information and error
details (if any).

v1SpaceApiKeyStatePhase.description:
SpaceApiKeyStatePhase defines the operational phases of a serverless space API key.

 - SPACE_API_KEY_STATE_PHASE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified phase.
 - SPACE_API_KEY_STATE_PHASE_PROCESSING: The API key is being created or synced to the regional data plane.
 - SPACE_API_KEY_STATE_PHASE_READY: The API key is installed in the regional data plane and fully operational.
 - SPACE_API_KEY_STATE_PHASE_DISABLED: The API key has been temporarily or permanently disabled/revoked.
 - SPACE_API_KEY_STATE_PHASE_DELETING: The API key is being deleted from the regional data plane.
